top3.sql:
SELECT Laboratory.Date 
FROM Laboratory 
JOIN Patient ON Laboratory.ID = Patient.ID 
WHERE Patient.ID = '48473' 
AND Laboratory.GOT > (SELECT MAX(Laboratory.GOT) FROM Laboratory WHERE Laboratory.GOT <= (SELECT AVG(Laboratory.GOT) FROM Laboratory));

SELECT Laboratory.Date
FROM Laboratory
JOIN Patient ON Laboratory.ID = Patient.ID
WHERE Patient.ID = '48473' AND Laboratory.GOT > (
    SELECT Laboratory.GOT
    FROM Laboratory
    JOIN Patient ON Laboratory.ID = Patient.ID
    WHERE Patient.ID = '48473'
    ORDER BY Laboratory.Date DESC
    LIMIT 1
);

final.sql:
SELECT Laboratory.Date 
FROM Laboratory 
JOIN Patient ON Laboratory.ID = Patient.ID 
WHERE Patient.ID = '48473' 
AND Laboratory.GOT > (SELECT MAX(Laboratory.GOT) FROM Laboratory WHERE Laboratory.GOT <= (SELECT AVG(Laboratory.GOT) FROM Laboratory));
